ops.title: De-dual-home the slop-cop plugin (own repo vs cc-skills copy)
ops.description: slop-cop's plugin.json + content exist in two homes (its own repo marketplace and cc-skills/plugins/slop-cop) — both now on autobump so version churn is independent and harmless (caches key per-marketplace), but content drift between the homes is unguarded. Pick a canonical home, make the other a pointer or delete it, and migrate installed consumers.

ops.text: one canonical slop-cop plugin home decided and recorded
the non-canonical copy removed or reduced to a marketplace pointer
consumers on this machine migrated (installed_plugins.json shows only the canonical marketplace)
